headline: Heartland Dental acquires Smile Design Dentistry from Tenex Capital Management
notes: 50 offices across Central FL / Tampa Bay. Strong comp for other mid-size FL dental groups. Already-PE target = exit at scale signal

headline: ADG acquires Golden Gate Animal Allergy and Dermatology
notes: Part of 4-practice rollup batch. Vet specialty rollup thesis is hot — good lookalike trigger

headline: ADG acquires Animal Skin and Allergy Clinic of Lynnwood
notes: Pacific Northwest expansion. Brings ADG to 40+ locations in 14 states

acquired_city: Toledo / Maumee / Oregon / Alliance / Akron / Louisville, OH
headline: Dental365 enters Ohio with 6-practice acquisition from Dr. Jon Frankel
notes: Owner-operator Dr. Frankel joins with 26 dentists + 200 employees. Perfect comp for other owner-operator OH dental groups

headline: Aria Care Partners acquires Coronado Dental
notes: First AZ presence for Aria. Niche sub-segment (mobile dental) — limited lookalike pool

headline: Dains Accountants expands into North West with Stockport acquisition of HURST
notes: HURST: 13 partners + 100-person team. Dains' 16th deal since 2021. Strong trigger for other regional Top 100 UK firms

headline: BK Plus acquires Walker Moyle Chartered Accountants
notes: Walker Moyle = oldest practice in BK Plus portfolio (since 1925). 3 offices in West Cornwall. Regional owner-operator comp

headline: BK Plus acquires Pooleys Chartered Accountants
notes: Part of same South West expansion batch as Walker Moyle

headline: bk plus strengthens Yorkshire with Crowther Chartered Accountants
notes: Crowther since 1995. Abacus House HQ. Owner-operator mid-size firm — strong Yorkshire comp

headline: RedBird Capital acquires Affinia from Sovereign Capital Partners
notes: Platform recap not a sell-side trigger. But shows LP appetite — useful to reference in pitches to firms considering first PE deal

headline: Caterpillar acquires ASX-listed RPMGlobal
notes: Large public-co cross-border deal. Limited direct lookalikes at same scale, but useful for mining-tech narrative

headline: MIRATECH completes acquisition of Exhaust Control Industries
notes: Founded 1982. Exhaust + emissions control for diesel/gas power gen. Great inbound-US-buyer comp for mid-market AU industrials

headline: DECO Australia acquires Opening Roof Specialists
notes: Founded 1987. Minto industrial estate. Joined DECO Group in 2024. Strong comp for other AU building-products SMBs
